{{Quote|Return to the bridge, Captain, and prepare to make the jump to lightspeed. Ord Mantell is waiting.|Grand Admiral Thrawn, to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Pellaeon]]|<ref name="Last Command" />}}
The '''Battle of Ord Mantell''' was an attack launched by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] to ensure that the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] failed to anticipate that he was planning an assault on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

{{Battle-stub}}
